name: Spite
description: You unleash a shriek of pure malice at a creature within a short (10 unit) distance. If your spell check beats the target's resilience, they take 10 psychic damage. If your spell check beats their resilience by 4 or more, they also become stunned. This spell requires the target to be able to hear.
charge: The spell becomes an area effect with a 3 unit radius centered on a point you can see within a short (10 unit) distance. All creatures in the area whose resilience is beaten by your spell check take 15 psychic damage and 10 dark damage. Creatures whose resilience is beaten by 4 or more become stunned.
